title: Project Analyst - Finance Tools Implementation
description:
YOUR ROLE

As part of our Finance Convergence project, we are implementing new finance tools to standardize and optimize processes across the Asia-Pacific region. To ensure the success of this initiative, we are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Project Analyst to lead the management of prerequisites for these tools in collaboration with local teams.

WHAT ARE YOU GOING TO DO?

  • Managing the prerequisites for the deployment of finance tools across the Asia-Pacific region.
  • Coordinating with local teams to define and validate user roles, workflow approvers, work methodologies, and process volumes.
  • Ensuring that all required data and configurations are prepared and ready for seamless integration in the finance tools.
  • Identifying potential bottlenecks or risks in the preparation process and proactively implementing solutions.
  • Collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure alignment between local and regional requirements.
  • Providing regular updates and progress reports to project stakeholders, ensuring adherence to timelines and objectives.
  • Supporting the local teams with ad hoc analysis, training, and troubleshooting related to the finance tools implementation.

WHAT ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

  • This role is for a contractual period of 15-months
  • At least a Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.
  • Demonstrated ability to adapt to new systems, tools, and processes quickly.
  • Proven ability to manage multiple tasks and meet tight deadlines in a structured and organized manner
  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including data analysis, pivot tables, and formula creation.
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to assess and organize complex data sets.
  • Familiarity with financial processes and reporting requirements.
  • Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to engage and collaborate with stakeholders at all levels.
  • Highly detail-oriented with a strong focus on accuracy and quality.
  • Adaptable and comfortable working in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
  • Challenge-driven and proactive in identifying and resolving issues.
  • Strong time management skills and adherence to deadlines.
  •  Effective communication and collaboration skills to work with diverse teams across multiple countries.
  •  Self-motivated and capable of managing tasks independently while maintaining accountability.
  • Experience in finance tools implementation or a similar role is highly desirable.
  • Solid understanding of finance tools and workflows, with experience in finance tools implementation being a plus.

postedCompany.name: CEVA ASIA PACIFIC HOLDINGS COMPANY PTE. LTD.
